title: Add import schema and migration for staging/conflict tables
acceptance_criteria: Database schema includes import session, staged row, and conflict decision persistence
Migration applies cleanly and generated types remain consistent
All tables enforce user scoping for data isolation
Typecheck passes for schema and database type updates
deliverables: drizzle migration files for csv import persistence
completion_summary: Added CSV import staging/conflict schema tables, generated Drizzle migration + snapshot, and updated DB inferred types for import persistence.
